round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Synthesized cross-agent evidence to reinforce the linguistic conclusion, though the R1 evidence was already definitive.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Used linguistic evidence to resolve ambiguity with North Macedonia/Serbia, strengthening the confidence in Bulgaria.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Used linguistic and landscape evidence to downgrade Romania and North Macedonia, refining the probability distribution.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Leveraged linguistic and meta evidence to rule out North Macedonia, improving the specificity of the regulatory analysis.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Corroborated infrastructure observations with linguistic findings to solidify the rural Bulgaria classification.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the definitive nature of the linguistic evidence ('вратата') and effectively synthesized the corroborating infrastructure and landscape cues to confirm Bulgaria. The elimination of other candidates was logical and well-supported.
